raw.message: Just $10.99 gets you the thick crust, golden edges and cheesy corners of a perfect Detroit-Style Pizza! Mini Cup Pepperoni or Create-Your-Own 2-Top.

hook.summary: Extreme close-up of a Detroit-style pizza cheese pull.
hook.visual_action: A hand lifts a slice of pizza, creating a long, satisfying cheese stretch with crispy pepperoni in focus.

scene_flow: Close-up cheese pull with melting mozzarella and pepperoni.
Fast-paced montage of crispy pepperoni and pizza being removed from a pan.
Slow-motion lift of a thick pizza slice showing the airy crust and cheese.
Final product reveal with branding and price point.
audience_proxy: Hungry adults and pizza lovers looking for a high-value, indulgent meal.
